final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a WeChat Official Account article cover announcing the "染秋" fragrance launch.

Style/medium: premium editorial design, high-end luxury aesthetic, clean typography-driven layout
Composition: centered composition, title placed at visual center with balanced negative space, 900x500 aspect ratio
Subject: elegant Chinese title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the focal point, refined fragrance bottle or autumn leaf motif as secondary element
Scene/backdrop: minimalist gradient background transitioning from warm amber to soft cream, subtle autumn atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, sophisticated and serene mood
Color palette: warm amber and burnt orange as primary, cream and soft gold as secondary, deep brown as accent
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title must be the dominant visual element; design must read clearly at 900x500 thumbnail size; maintain premium brand feel
Avoid: cluttered layout, multiple competing focal points, generic stock imagery, excessive decorative elements, busy patterns
